<session_context>
IMPORTANT: When using tools, include these values in your tool call parameters:

- workspaceId: "default" (no specific workspace selected)

Include these in the "context" parameter of your tool calls.
NOTE: Use "default" as the workspaceId when no specific workspace context is needed.
</session_context>
Add an introduction paragraph to the beginning of my troubleshooting guide.

<thinking>
{"goal": "Prepend a standard introductory paragraph to Support/troubleshooting.md in the default workspace.", "memory": "The user is currently editing documentation for the support portal. The file Support/troubleshooting.md exists and follows the company’s markdown style guide, which requires an intro section that explains troubleshooting steps and links to related resources. The last edit was made on 2025-11-25 by adding a new FAQ section; no other changes have been staged since then.", "requirements": ["Support/troubleshooting.md exists in the default workspace", "The file contains at least one existing heading (e.g., \"# Troubleshooting\")", "No uncommitted changes are pending for Support/troubleshooting.md", "A backup of the current file is available in a temporary directory"], "assessment": {"complex": false, "risky": false}, "confidence": 0.85, "plan": ["Create a backup copy of Support/troubleshooting.md to /tmp", "Read the current contents of Support/troubleshooting.md", "Prepend the standard intro paragraph before the first heading", "Write the updated content back to Support/troubleshooting.md", "Verify that the file now starts with the new intro and retains all original sections"]}
</thinking>

{"filePath": "Support/troubleshooting.md", "content": "# Troubleshooting Guide

This guide helps you resolve common issues with our platform. Follow the steps in order and contact support if problems persist.

**Before you start:**
- Check system requirements
- Verify internet connection
- Review error logs

---

", "sessionId": "session_1731109100000_g9h0i1j2k", "workspaceId": "default"}
